attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
 TEMP.REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY,
 TEMP.SALES_ORDER_KEY,
 TEMP.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
 TEMP.PRODUCT_KEY,
 TEMP.AR_TRX_KEY,
 TEMP.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY,
 TEMP.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY,
 Coalesce(POS_TRANS.BK_END_USER_WIPS_SITE_USE_KEY,Cast(-999 As Integer)) AS END_CUSTOMER_KEY,
 TEMP.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
 TEMP.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
 TEMP.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
 TEMP.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
 TEMP.DIRECT_CORP_ADJUSTMENT_KEY,
 TEMP.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY,
 TEMP.SALES_REP_NUMBER,
 TEMP.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT,
 TEMP.BK_SALES_ADJ_LINE_NUMBER_INT,
 TEMP.BK_SALES_ADJ_NUMBER_INT,
 TEMP.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT,
 TEMP.DD_BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD,
 TEMP.DD_GL_DATETIME,
 TEMP.DD_BK_TRXL_CURRENCY_CD,
 TEMP.BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME,
 TEMP.DV_FISCAL_DT,
 TEMP.DD_FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CD,
 TEMP.DD_BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CD,
 TEMP.DD_BK_DIRECT_CORP_ADJ_TYPE_CD,
 TEMP.DD_SERVICE_TYPE_CD,
 TEMP.BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE,
 TEMP.AR_TRX_DATETIME,
 TEMP.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD,
 TEMP.DV_FORWARD_REVERSE_CD,
 TEMP.DV_CORPORATE_REVENUE_FLG,
 TEMP.DV_IC_REVENUE_FLG,
 TEMP.DV_CHARGES_FLG,
 TEMP.DV_MISC_FLG,
 TEMP.DV_SERVICE_FLG,
 TEMP.DV_INTERNATIONAL_DEMO_FLG,
 TEMP.DV_REPLACEMENT_DEMO_FLG,
 TEMP.DV_REVENUE_FLG,
 TEMP.DV_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT,
 TEMP.DV_COMP_US_NET_LIST_PRICE_AMT,
 TEMP.DV_COMP_US_GROSS_LIST_PRICE_AM,
 TEMP.DV_COMP_US_NET_COST_AMT,
 TEMP.DV_COMP_US_GROSS_REV_AMT,
 TEMP.DV_COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT,
 TEMP.DV_COMP_US_2TIER_CMDM_AMT,
 TEMP.DV_COMP_US_GROSS_COST_AMT,
 TEMP.DV_COMP_US_STANDARD_PRICE_AMT,
 TEMP.DD_EXTENDED_NET_QTY,
 TEMP.DD_EXTENDED_GROSS_QTY,
 TEMP.EDW_CREATE_USER,
 TEMP.EDW_CREATE_DATETIME,
 TEMP.EDW_UPDATE_USER, 
 TEMP.EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME,
 TEMP.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD,
 TEMP.DV_PRODUCT_KEY,
 TEMP.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
 TEMP.SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT,
 /*ADDED BELOW LOGIC AS PART OF DSV Q1FY16 BY */ 
 COALESCE(POS_TRANS.BK_BOOKING_POS_TRX_ID_INT, -9999) AS BK_BOOKING_POS_TRX_ID_INT,
 TEMP.DSV_FLG
 /*ADDED LOGIC AS PART OF DSV Q1FY16 BY */ 
 ,TEMP.POB_TYPE_CD
 ,COALESCE (CASE WHEN COALESCE(POS_TRANS.BK_DEAL_ID,'UNKNOWN') IN ('UNKNOWN') OR 
                             POS_TRANS.BK_DEAL_ID <='0' THEN 
  CASE
     WHEN     LENGTH (
                 LTRIM (POS_TRANS.DISTRIBUTOR_REPORTED_DEAL_ID,
                        '0123456789')) = 0
          AND LENGTH (POS_TRANS.DISTRIBUTOR_REPORTED_DEAL_ID) >= 7
     THEN
        POS_TRANS.DISTRIBUTOR_REPORTED_DEAL_ID
  END
  
  ELSE 
  POS_TRANS.BK_DEAL_ID
  END,'UNKNOWN') AS BK_DEAL_ID
 FROM
 (SELECT
 NDSPAD.ALLOCATED_POS_ADJ_KEY AS REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY,
 Cast(-9999 As Integer) AS SALES_ORDER_KEY,
 Cast(-9999 As Integer) AS SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
 NDSPAD.PRODUCT_KEY,
  -9999 AR_TRX_KEY,
  -9999 AR_TRX_LINE_KEY,
  -9999 BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY,
   -999 BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
  -999 SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
  -999 SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
  NDSPAD.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY AS SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
  -9996  DIRECT_CORP_ADJUSTMENT_KEY,
  -996 GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY,
   NDSPAD.BK_SALES_REP_NUMBER AS SALES_REP_NUMBER,
   NDSPAD.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT,
   Cast(-999 As Integer) AS BK_SALES_ADJ_LINE_NUMBER_INT,
   Cast(-999 As Integer) AS BK_SALES_ADJ_NUMBER_INT,
   NDSPAD.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT AS DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT,
   'UNKNO' DD_BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD,
   NDSPAD.SALES_ADJUSTMENT_DATETIME DD_GL_DATETIME,
   NULL DD_BK_TRXL_CURRENCY_CD,
    -999 BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME,
   CAST(NDSPAD.SALES_ADJUSTMENT_DATETIME AS DATE) AS DV_FISCAL_DT,
    NULL DD_FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CD,
   'UNKNOWN' DD_BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CD,
  'POS ALLOCATION' DD_BK_DIRECT_CORP_ADJ_TYPE_CD,
  NULL DD_SERVICE_TYPE_CD,
  'UNKNOWN' BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE,
   NDSPAD.SALES_ADJUSTMENT_DATETIME AS AR_TRX_DATETIME,
  'POS' REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD,
   'UNKNOWN' DV_FORWARD_REVERSE_CD,
  'Y' DV_CORPORATE_REVENUE_FLG,
  'Y' DV_IC_REVENUE_FLG,
 'N' DV_CHARGES_FLG,
 'N' DV_MISC_FLG,
 NDSPAD.SERVICE_BOOKING_FLAG AS DV_SERVICE_FLG,
 'N' DV_INTERNATIONAL_DEMO_FLG,
 'N' DV_REPLACEMENT_DEMO_FLG,
 'Y' DV_REVENUE_FLG,
 NDSPAD.EXTENDED_NET_PRICE_USD_AMOUNT AS DV_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT,
 NDSPAD.EXTENDED_LIST_PRICE_USD_AMOUNT AS DV_COMP_US_NET_LIST_PRICE_AMT,
 NDSPAD.EXTENDED_LIST_PRICE_USD_AMOUNT AS DV_COMP_US_GROSS_LIST_PRICE_AM,
 NDSPAD.EXTENDED_COST_PRICE_USD_AMOUNT AS DV_COMP_US_NET_COST_AMT,
 NDSPAD.EXTENDED_NET_PRICE_USD_AMOUNT AS DV_COMP_US_GROSS_REV_AMT,
 NDSPAD.EXTENDED_NET_PRICE_USD_AMOUNT AS DV_COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT,
 Cast(0.000000 As Decimal(18,6)) AS DV_COMP_US_2TIER_CMDM_AMT,
 NDSPAD.EXTENDED_COST_PRICE_USD_AMOUNT AS DV_COMP_US_GROSS_COST_AMT,
 Cast(0.000000 As Decimal(18,6)) AS DV_COMP_US_STANDARD_PRICE_AMT,
  NDSPAD.ADJUSTMENT_QTY DD_EXTENDED_NET_QTY,
  NDSPAD.ADJUSTMENT_QTY DD_EXTENDED_GROSS_QTY,
 USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER,
 CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DATETIME,
 USER AS EDW_UPDATE_USER,
 CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME,
 /* Updated the below column derivation as part of Q2FY15- OA
 CASE WHEN NPTLOA.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT IS NOT NULL THEN 'BUNDLE' ELSE 'STANDALONE' END AS  DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD,
 NDSPAD.PRODUCT_KEY AS DV_PRODUCT_KEY,
 CAST(-9999 As Integer) AS DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
 CAST(-9999 As Integer) AS SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT */
  NDSPAD.ATTRIBUTION_TYPE_CD            AS DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD,
  NDSPAD.TOP_SKU_ATTRIBUTED_PRODUCT_KEY AS DV_PRODUCT_KEY  ,
  CAST(-9999 AS INTEGER)                AS DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY  ,
  NDSPAD.BK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT    AS SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT,
  CASE  WHEN NDSPAD.DSV_OR_POS_TYPE_CD='DSV_POS' THEN 'Y'  ELSE 'N' END  DSV_FLG
 ,NDSPAD.POB_TYPE_CD
 FROM 
 $$SLSORDVWDB.N_DRVD_SCA_POS_ADJ_DETAILS NDSPAD
 /* Removed the below join as part of Q2FY15-OA
 LEFT OUTER JOIN  -- ADDED THIS CONDITION AS PART OF  Q1FY15 OFFER ATTRIBUTION 
 ( 
 SELECT BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT FROM 
 $$SLSORDVWDB.N_POS_TRX_LINE_OFFER_ATRBTN  
 GROUP BY 1
 ) NPTLOA  
 ON NPTLOA.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT=NDSPAD.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT */
 WHERE NDSPAD.ALLOCATED_POS_ADJ_KEY  > ( SELECT LAST_EXTRACT_ID 
 FROM $$ETLVWDB.DW_JOB_STREAMS 
 WHERE JOB_STREAM_ID = 'wf_WI_GL_REVENUE_MEASURE_POS_ALLOC' AND JOB_GROUP_ID = 'EDWTD_REV_MEASURE')
 /*ADDED BELOW LOGIC AS PART OF DSV Q1FY16 BY */ 
 AND NDSPAD.DSV_OR_POS_TYPE_CD IN ('POS','DSV_POS')
 /*ADDED BELOW LOGIC AS PART OF DSV Q1FY16 BY */ 
 ) TEMP
 LEFT OUTER JOIN 
 $$SLSORDVWDB.N_POS_TRANSACTION_LINE POS_TRANS
 ON  TEMP.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT = POS_TRANS.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT
 
 /* rivijay : Below union all is added to Process POS transaction which get missed whenever bookings team does some fix */
 
 UNION ALL
 SELECT
 TEMP.REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY,
 TEMP.SALES_ORDER_KEY,
 TEMP.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
 TEMP.PRODUCT_KEY,
 TEMP.AR_TRX_KEY,
 TEMP.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY,
 TEMP.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY,
 Coalesce(POS_TRANS.BK_END_USER_WIPS_SITE_USE_KEY,Cast(-999 As Integer)) AS END_CUSTOMER_KEY,
 TEMP.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
 TEMP.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
 TEMP.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
 TEMP.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
 TEMP.DIRECT_CORP_ADJUSTMENT_KEY,
 TEMP.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY,
 TEMP.SALES_REP_NUMBER,
 TEMP.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT,
 TEMP.BK_SALES_ADJ_LINE_NUMBER_INT,
 TEMP.BK_SALES_ADJ_NUMBER_INT,
 TEMP.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT,
 TEMP.DD_BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD,
 TEMP.DD_GL_DATETIME,
 TEMP.DD_BK_TRXL_CURRENCY_CD,
 TEMP.BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME,
 TEMP.DV_FISCAL_DT,
 TEMP.DD_FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CD,
 TEMP.DD_BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CD,
 TEMP.DD_BK_DIRECT_CORP_ADJ_TYPE_CD,
 TEMP.DD_SERVICE_TYPE_CD,
 TEMP.BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE,
 TEMP.AR_TRX_DATETIME,
 TEMP.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD,
 TEMP.DV_FORWARD_REVERSE_CD,
 TEMP.DV_CORPORATE_REVENUE_FLG,
 TEMP.DV_IC_REVENUE_FLG,
 TEMP.DV_CHARGES_FLG,
 TEMP.DV_MISC_FLG,
 TEMP.DV_SERVICE_FLG,
 TEMP.DV_INTERNATIONAL_DEMO_FLG,
 TEMP.DV_REPLACEMENT_DEMO_FLG,
 TEMP.DV_REVENUE_FLG,
 TEMP.DV_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT,
 TEMP.DV_COMP_US_NET_LIST_PRICE_AMT,
 TEMP.DV_COMP_US_GROSS_LIST_PRICE_AM,
 TEMP.DV_COMP_US_NET_COST_AMT,
 TEMP.DV_COMP_US_GROSS_REV_AMT,
 TEMP.DV_COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT,
 TEMP.DV_COMP_US_2TIER_CMDM_AMT,
 TEMP.DV_COMP_US_GROSS_COST_AMT,
 TEMP.DV_COMP_US_STANDARD_PRICE_AMT,
 TEMP.DD_EXTENDED_NET_QTY,
 TEMP.DD_EXTENDED_GROSS_QTY,
 TEMP.EDW_CREATE_USER,
 TEMP.EDW_CREATE_DATETIME,
 TEMP.EDW_UPDATE_USER, 
 TEMP.EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME,
 TEMP.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD,
 TEMP.DV_PRODUCT_KEY,
 TEMP.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
 TEMP.SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT,
 /*ADDED BELOW LOGIC AS PART OF DSV Q1FY16 BY */ 
 COALESCE(POS_TRANS.BK_BOOKING_POS_TRX_ID_INT, -9999) AS BK_BOOKING_POS_TRX_ID_INT,
 TEMP.DSV_FLG
 /*ADDED LOGIC AS PART OF DSV Q1FY16 BY */ 
 ,TEMP.POB_TYPE_CD
 ,COALESCE (CASE WHEN COALESCE(POS_TRANS.BK_DEAL_ID,'UNKNOWN') IN ('UNKNOWN') OR 
                             POS_TRANS.BK_DEAL_ID <='0' THEN 
  CASE
     WHEN     LENGTH (
                 LTRIM (POS_TRANS.DISTRIBUTOR_REPORTED_DEAL_ID,
                        '0123456789')) = 0
          AND LENGTH (POS_TRANS.DISTRIBUTOR_REPORTED_DEAL_ID) >= 7
     THEN
        POS_TRANS.DISTRIBUTOR_REPORTED_DEAL_ID
  END
  
  ELSE 
  POS_TRANS.BK_DEAL_ID
  END,'UNKNOWN') AS BK_DEAL_ID
 FROM
 (SELECT
 NDSPAD.ALLOCATED_POS_ADJ_KEY AS REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY,
 Cast(-9999 As Integer) AS SALES_ORDER_KEY,
 Cast(-9999 As Integer) AS SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
 NDSPAD.PRODUCT_KEY,
  -9999 AR_TRX_KEY,
  -9999 AR_TRX_LINE_KEY,
  -9999 BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY,
   -999 BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
  -999 SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
  -999 SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
  NDSPAD.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY AS SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
  -9996  DIRECT_CORP_ADJUSTMENT_KEY,
  -996 GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY,
   NDSPAD.BK_SALES_REP_NUMBER AS SALES_REP_NUMBER,
   NDSPAD.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT,
   Cast(-999 As Integer) AS BK_SALES_ADJ_LINE_NUMBER_INT,
   Cast(-999 As Integer) AS BK_SALES_ADJ_NUMBER_INT,
   NDSPAD.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT AS DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT,
   'UNKNO' DD_BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD,
   NDSPAD.SALES_ADJUSTMENT_DATETIME DD_GL_DATETIME,
   NULL DD_BK_TRXL_CURRENCY_CD,
    -999 BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME,
   CAST(NDSPAD.SALES_ADJUSTMENT_DATETIME AS DATE) AS DV_FISCAL_DT,
    NULL DD_FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CD,
   'UNKNOWN' DD_BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CD,
  'POS ALLOCATION' DD_BK_DIRECT_CORP_ADJ_TYPE_CD,
  NULL DD_SERVICE_TYPE_CD,
  'UNKNOWN' BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE,
   NDSPAD.SALES_ADJUSTMENT_DATETIME AS AR_TRX_DATETIME,
  'POS' REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD,
   'UNKNOWN' DV_FORWARD_REVERSE_CD,
  'Y' DV_CORPORATE_REVENUE_FLG,
  'Y' DV_IC_REVENUE_FLG,
 'N' DV_CHARGES_FLG,
 'N' DV_MISC_FLG,
 NDSPAD.SERVICE_BOOKING_FLAG AS DV_SERVICE_FLG,
 'N' DV_INTERNATIONAL_DEMO_FLG,
 'N' DV_REPLACEMENT_DEMO_FLG,
 'Y' DV_REVENUE_FLG,
 NDSPAD.EXTENDED_NET_PRICE_USD_AMOUNT AS DV_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT,
 NDSPAD.EXTENDED_LIST_PRICE_USD_AMOUNT AS DV_COMP_US_NET_LIST_PRICE_AMT,
 NDSPAD.EXTENDED_LIST_PRICE_USD_AMOUNT AS DV_COMP_US_GROSS_LIST_PRICE_AM,
 NDSPAD.EXTENDED_COST_PRICE_USD_AMOUNT AS DV_COMP_US_NET_COST_AMT,
 NDSPAD.EXTENDED_NET_PRICE_USD_AMOUNT AS DV_COMP_US_GROSS_REV_AMT,
 NDSPAD.EXTENDED_NET_PRICE_USD_AMOUNT AS DV_COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT,
 Cast(0.000000 As Decimal(18,6)) AS DV_COMP_US_2TIER_CMDM_AMT,
 NDSPAD.EXTENDED_COST_PRICE_USD_AMOUNT AS DV_COMP_US_GROSS_COST_AMT,
 Cast(0.000000 As Decimal(18,6)) AS DV_COMP_US_STANDARD_PRICE_AMT,
  NDSPAD.ADJUSTMENT_QTY DD_EXTENDED_NET_QTY,
  NDSPAD.ADJUSTMENT_QTY DD_EXTENDED_GROSS_QTY,
 USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER,
 CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DATETIME,
 USER AS EDW_UPDATE_USER,
 CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME,
 /* Updated the below column derivation as part of Q2FY15- OA
 CASE WHEN NPTLOA.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT IS NOT NULL THEN 'BUNDLE' ELSE 'STANDALONE' END AS  DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD,
 NDSPAD.PRODUCT_KEY AS DV_PRODUCT_KEY,
 CAST(-9999 As Integer) AS DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
 CAST(-9999 As Integer) AS SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT */
  NDSPAD.ATTRIBUTION_TYPE_CD            AS DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD,
  NDSPAD.TOP_SKU_ATTRIBUTED_PRODUCT_KEY AS DV_PRODUCT_KEY  ,
  CAST(-9999 AS INTEGER)                AS DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY  ,
  NDSPAD.BK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT    AS SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT,
  CASE  WHEN NDSPAD.DSV_OR_POS_TYPE_CD='DSV_POS' THEN 'Y'  ELSE 'N' END  DSV_FLG
  ,NDSPAD.POB_TYPE_CD
 FROM 
 $$SLSORDVWDB.N_DRVD_SCA_POS_ADJ_DETAILS NDSPAD
 /* Removed the below join as part of Q2FY15-OA
 LEFT OUTER JOIN  -- ADDED THIS CONDITION AS PART OF  Q1FY15 OFFER ATTRIBUTION 
 ( 
 SELECT BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT FROM 
 $$SLSORDVWDB.N_POS_TRX_LINE_OFFER_ATRBTN  
 GROUP BY 1
 ) NPTLOA  
 ON NPTLOA.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT=NDSPAD.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT */
 WHERE NDSPAD.ALLOCATED_POS_ADJ_KEY  in (
 /*rivijay : Created this table to put POS keys in case need to Process if bookings does fix */
 select POS_ADJ_KEY  from $$STGDB.REV_POS_ADJ_PRCS_KEY
 )
 /*ADDED BELOW LOGIC AS PART OF DSV Q1FY16 BY */ 
 AND NDSPAD.DSV_OR_POS_TYPE_CD IN ('POS','DSV_POS')
 /*ADDED BELOW LOGIC AS PART OF DSV Q1FY16 BY */ 
 ) TEMP
 LEFT OUTER JOIN 
 $$SLSORDVWDB.N_POS_TRANSACTION_LINE POS_TRANS
 ON  TEMP.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT = POS_TRANS.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT
